macroTone: Macro sentiment is steadier than it was at the start of the quarter, but physical balances are still driving most of the move.
exportSignal: Atlantic Basin export demand is keeping prompt barrels relatively tight.
weatherSignal: Late-season cold and spring maintenance are limiting the near-term cushion in products.
